name: Pork Satay
recipeIngredient: 1 green chili pepper, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the spices, oil, soy sauce, and salt to form a paste.
2. Add the pork and knead the paste into the meat using wet hands. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. To make the peanut sauce, place the coconut in a bowl and pour over the boiling water. Let it stand for 15 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture into a saucepan, pressing well to extract all moisture. Discard the coconut.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan and mix well. Cook over low heat, stirring until the sauce comes to a boil.
6. Serve hot with the cooked satay in hot oil.
